subject: [PATCH v2 2/2] nfs: update inode ctime after removexattr operation

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch updates the inode ctime after a removexattr operation in NFSv4.2 to ensure that the cached timestamp is refreshed. The problem it solves is that the stat() system call does not trigger a GETATTR request when delegated timestamps are used, resulting in an outdated ctime value. To fix this, the patch adds a trailing GETATTR request to the removexattr operation, similar to how setxattr operations update the inode's timestamp. This change ensures that the inode's ctime is accurately updated after removing extended attributes.
